data.title: Oklo on the rise after completing NRC pre-application assessment for Aurora powerhouse
data.description:
Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) +3.4% in early trading Thursday after saying it successfully completed the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission’s pre-application readiness assessment for its first commercial Aurora powerhouse project at Idaho National Laboratory.

Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) said the assessment affirmed its readiness to move forward and found no significant gaps that would prevent the NRC's acceptance of the application.

The company plans to submit the first phase of the Aurora-INL combined license application this year as part of its strategy to enable efficient and repeatable deployment of its Aurora powerhouses for commercial and federal customers.

"Our team has worked closely with the NRC to build a clear, efficient licensing pathway, and this is a good signal that we are on track," Oklo (OKLO) co-founder and CEO Jacob DeWitte said.

data.title: Fulgent Genetics gets EU approval for germline sequencing system
data.description:
• Fulgent Genetics (NASDAQ:FLGT) has received European Union’s CE certification for its germline next-generation sequencing system. 
  • This system includes FulgentExome and Fulgent Pipeline Manager, complying with the European Union’s in vitro diagnostic regulation.

data.title: Unity Software surges after Morgan Stanley says ad customers are reporting 'rapidly improving returns'
data.description:
Shares of Unity Software (NYSE:U) jumped about 12% on Thursday after Morgan Stanley noted that the company's ad customers are reporting rapidly improving returns.

The firm has an Overweight rating and a $25 price target on Unity's stock.

Analysts led by Matthew Cost said the company's customers are reporting rapidly improving returns and this leads them to believe that Unity's investments and restructuring over the past 18 months have produced a fundamentally more competitive ad product.

The analysts added that in recent weeks they have seen a marked improvement in the commentary from Unity's advertising customers and they believe that Unity Ads is delivering no less than 15% to 20% uplift on installs and purchases, i.e. the figures that management referred to at second quarter results.

"We would also reiterate that these advertisers are laser focused on ROAS [Return on Ad Spend] and we expect that U's ad customers will continue to move quickly to increase their ad budgets, as long as U's technology continues delivering stronger results," said the analysts.

The analysts highlighted three reasons why this could still be the early innings of Unity's ad inflection.

Firstly, Cost and his team said that after nearly a year of development and testing, Unity's new Vector ad model fully launched in May and after just two months we may be seeing the power of this technology shine through. Unity's scale, reach, and game engine leadership are unique assets that Vector is designed to fully leverage. As with all machine learning AI models, the analysts said they expect Vector's performance to only improve as the flywheel of more ad spend and faster training continues to spin up.

Secondly, Unity Ads just started using game engine data in July. Vector model is only as good as the data that drives its decision making. Unity's position as the leading mobile game engine in the world gives it access to data on consumer behavior that no other company can replicate and the analysts believe the company only started leveraging that data to target ads in the past two to three weeks.

The analysts noted that this seems to align closely with the improvement in customer commentary and they would expect Vector to continue improving, as it processes more and more runtime-level game data.

Lastly, Cost and his team said they believe Unity 6 adoption continues to grow strongly, as the company was already nearing 50% adoption at the second quarter results, and management noted that 80% of customers intend to upgrade. While this has the potential to drive a subscription revenue tailwind in the second half for the Create segment, it also has implications for Grow/advertising, according to the analysts.

Unity 6 brings new potential to integrate the data and sales motions across both segments. "In other words, more Unity 6 adoption likely also means more data for Unity Ads and stronger ROAS for U's advertiser customers," said the analysts.

The analysts said they remain fundamentally bullish on Unity's efforts to invest in its high-margin ad network business and leverage its unique data assets.

The analysts noted that there is still broad investor skepticism on Unity's ability to compete in advertising, "meaning there is significant potential upside to expectations and to the multiple the market will pay for U shares. To that point, we would point to our $40 bull case valuation as the potential next place for the market to focus."

data.title: BWX Technologies wins naval nuclear reactor component contract worth up to $2.6B
data.description:
BWX Technologies (NYSE:BWXT) +1.4% in early trading Thursday after saying it was awarded contracts totaling ~$2.6B including future options, to manufacture components for nuclear submarines and an aircraft carrier for the U.S. Navy.

The contracts primarily support Virginia and Columbia-class submarines as well as some work for certain Ford-class aircraft carrier components, and build on the $2.1B in awards the company announced in February.

Products contracted with the awards will be delivered during the next 6-8 years, BWXT (NYSE:BWXT) said.

The U.S. has been modernizing its nuclear-powered Navy fleet as part of broader efforts to counter China's growing influence in the Indo-Pacific region.

data.title: Wipro climbs after Q1 results show year-over-year large bookings surge 130%
data.description:
Wipro (NYSE:WIT) jumped 4% during early market action Thursday after its first quarter fiscal 2025 financial results demonstrated large deal bookings increasing by 131% year over year.

The India-based technology services and consulting company reported gross revenue of $2.58B for the quarter ended June 30, which was $10M more than the consensus estimate. First quarter GAAP earnings per share of $0.04 matched the consensus estimate.

Total bookings were at $4.97B, up by 24.1% quarter over quarter and 50.7% year over year in constant currency. Large deal bookings hit $2.66B, an increase of 49.7% quarter over quarter and 130.8% year over year in constant currency.

"In a quarter shaped by macroeconomic uncertainty, clients prioritized efficiency and cost optimization," said Wipro CEO Srini Pallia. "We partnered closely with them to address these needs, resulting in 16 large deals, including two mega deals. Building on the momentum from last quarter and supported by a strong pipeline, we are well positioned for the second half. AI is no longer experimental - it's central to our clients' strategies, and we are delivering real impact at scale."

Looking ahead to the quarter in progress, Wipro expects revenue from its IT Services business segment to be in the range of $2.56B to $2.61B.

data.title: Homebuilder sentiment ticks up one point in July, as expected
data.description: The NAHB/Wells Fargo Housing Market Index ticked up to 33 in June, matching the consensus, according to a report published Thursday.

data.title: Bullish sentiment falls this week, shows new AAII data
data.description:
Bullishness among individual investors fell this week again, according to a survey conducted by American Association of Individual Investors (AAII).

Bulls as per the survey stood at 39.3% for the week ending July 16, compared to 41.4% in the prior update. Meanwhile, bearish sentiment rose to 39% for the week, versus 35.6% the week before.

President Donald Trump’s endless changing trade policies are keeping global markets on toes. Last week, he slapped a 35% tariff on Canada, while this week he imposed a 30% tariff on imports from the European Union and Mexico. Investors are seeing the drama unfold after reports on Wednesday indicated Trump would fire Fed chair Jerome Powell soon. However, the President comment that it's “highly unlikely” calmed investors.

The S&P 500 (SP500) and Dow (DJI) fell 0.3% and 0.9%, respectively in the last one week, while Nasdaq (COMP:IND) gained 0.5%.

Meanwhile, the market is also decked for another earnings season, with big banks and companies, including Johnson & Johnson, already coming up with their quarterly reports.

According to AAII, neutral sentiment, or expectations that stock prices will stay essentially unchanged over the next six months, also saw a fall during the week, with the figure standing at 21.8%, compared to 23% last week.

The survey has been conducted by the American Association of Individual Investors since 1987, in which it asks respondents for their thoughts on where the market is heading in the next six months.

S&P 500 Tracking Funds: (MUTF:FXAIX), (MUTF:VFIAX), (MUTF:VFFSX), (MUTF:SWPPX), (NYSEARCA:SPY), (NYSEARCA:VOO), (NYSEARCA:IVV), (NYSEARCA:RSP), (NYSEARCA:SSO), (NYSEARCA:SH), (NYSEARCA:SDS) and (NYSEARCA:SPXU).

data.title: Monarch Casino jumps to 52-week high after strong earnings report
data.description:
Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ:MCRI) soared in early trading on Thursday after reporting record financial results for Q2. Revenue rose 6.8% year-over-year to $136.9 million, with casino revenues up 12.1%. Net income grew 19.1% to $27 million, equating to diluted earnings per share of $1.44, a 21% increase over last year. Adjusted EBITDA rose 16.8% to $51.3 million. 

Notably, the casino company maintained a strong balance sheet with $71.6 million in cash at the end of the quarter and no borrowings, declared a $0.30 per share dividend, and repurchased $19.8 million in shares.

Truist Securities analyst Barry Jonas said the firm continues to favor Monarch Casino (NASDAQ:MCRI) with its best-in-class assets and strong balance sheet. The firm boosted its price target to $120 from $105 and raised 2025-2026 EBITDA estimates. 

"Mgmt plans to continue to buyback shares opportunistically. With net leverage at around zero (amongst the best in our coverage) MCRI is well positioned for M&A, share repurchases and/or a special dividend. That said, mgmt noted that the M&A environment remains challenged but will continue to evaluate gaming and even non-gaming targets as well," highlighted Jonas.

Jefferies analyst David Katz said the better than expected results for MCRI are driven by the early impact from the Reno rooms renovation, which should continue to ramp going forward. "With the addition of the momentum in Black Hawk, the company is uniquely positioned to continue generating same-store growth," he added.

Shares of Monarch Casino & Resort (MCRI) were up 23.6% at 9:58 a.m. to trade a new all-time high.
